hypothesis: If NEB is performed using NN-BAX with an iteratively fine-tuned EquiformerV2 surrogate trained on initial/final states plus actively acquired configurations, then it will reproduce the ground-truth minimum energy paths obtained by classical NEB for LJ7 and LJ38 transitions—across varying numbers of intermediate minima—with comparable convergence (fmax) and MAEi while requiring substantially fewer expensive simulator evaluations.
